name: Vegetables with Chicken Breast (German)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean broccoli and cauliflower and cut into small pieces.
2. Peel and slice carrots.
3. Bring the vegetable broth to a boil and cook the cauliflower for 5 minutes in it.
4. Add broccoli and carrots and cook an additional 5 minutes.
5. Strain the vegetables through a colander and set aside the broth.
6. Melt butter and stir in flour, cooking until light yellow, then add hot vegetable broth, cream, and season to taste with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet and fry chicken breasts on both sides for about 6 minutes each.
8. Place chicken on paper towel to absorb grease.
9. Arrange chicken on plates, top with vegetables, and pour sauce over the meat.
10. Serve with rice.
